home.hero_desc: Uncover the true market value of your assets with expert-grade analysis.
home.tip_joints_desc: Look for dovetails. Machine-cut vs hand-cut tells the era. Irregularity is your friend.
home.tip_glass_desc: Authentic wear should be on the base, not the sides. Look for 'pontil' marks.
home.tip_veneer_desc: Check the edges. Thick veneer (1-2mm) usually means pre-1850. Paper-thin is modern.
home.tip_hardware_desc: Look behind the handles. Extra holes suggest the hardware was replaced, affecting value.
home.tip_smell_desc: Old wood has a distinct, musty but not rotten smell. New stains smell like chemicals.

analysis.title: Professional Appraisal
analysis.price_guidance_desc: See the real price vs what sellers ask
analysis.dealer_perspective_desc: How a dealer would actually position this piece
analysis.negotiation_strategy_desc: Exact offer range and negotiation strategy
analysis.when_to_walk_away_desc: Conditions that make this a bad buy
analysis.market_insight_desc: How strong demand is and what actually drives value
analysis.confidence_high_desc: High confidence — strong visual and market match
analysis.confidence_medium_desc: Medium confidence — based on visible features only
analysis.confidence_low_desc: Low confidence — high uncertainty, proceed carefully
analysis.walk_away_desc: Above this, you are likely overpaying. Proceed carefully.
analysis.disclaimer: AI analysis is probabilistic. Always verify in person before purchasing.

results.title: Curator's Findings
results.cant_find_it_desc: Our global network of curators and auction houses is constantly updating. Set an alert and we'll notify you the moment it appears.

feedback_history.no_feedback_desc: Submit feedback on your analysis results to help improve the dealer engine.
feedback_history.share_hard_pass: Dealer Warning: This item is a Hard Pass (Score: {{score}}). {{judgement}}
feedback_history.share_tier_d: Antique Hunter Alert: This {{title}} is a Tier D utility item. {{judgement}}
feedback_history.investment_insight_fallback: The high restoration cost is the primary risk factor impacting your potential ROI.
feedback_history.must_have_insight_fallback: A great purchase for personal enjoyment. The condition is secondary to your aesthetic preference, but do budget for restoration.
feedback_history.resale_insight_fallback: The high restoration cost severely limits your margin. Proceed with caution.

paywall.title: This item may be overpriced

paywall.detail_warning: Small details will significantly impact price
paywall.low_value_notice: This is a Tier D utility item. No need to unlock — save your dealer view for higher-value finds.
paywall.value_anchor: This is typically a {{low}}–{{high}} item in real terms.
